Operation 'getTranscript' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_context. Description is too minimal. Added clarity about supported formats, required parameters (file ID and format), return value details, and important context about availability after processing completion. This helps AI agents understand prerequisites and when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve the transcript for a file in the specified format.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the completed transcript for a file in the specified format (e.g., JSON, SRT, VTT). Requires the file ID and desired output format as path parameters. Returns the transcript with transcription metadata. Only available after transcription processing is complete.
data.reasoning: Description is too minimal. Added clarity about supported formats, required parameters (file ID and format), return value details, and important context about availability after processing completion. This helps AI agents understand prerequisites and when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'deleteFile' has semantic quality issues: missing_side_effects, missing_context. Original description mentions what is deleted but lacks important context about permanence and irreversibility. Added clarity about the destructive nature of the operation, required parameter, and return value. This helps AI agents understand the severity and consequences of this operation.

data.current_description: Delete a file and its associated transcription data.
data.description_suggestion: Delete a file and its associated transcription data permanently. Requires the file ID as a path parameter. This action is irreversible and will remove all transcription results and metadata. Returns a success confirmation upon completion.
data.reasoning: Original description mentions what is deleted but lacks important context about permanence and irreversibility. Added clarity about the destructive nature of the operation, required parameter, and return value. This helps AI agents understand the severity and consequences of this operation.

message: Operation 'listFiles' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is too generic. Description lacks details about pagination parameters, return structure, and sorting behavior. Enhanced both to clarify pagination support, specify return type (FileList), and explain default ordering. This enables AI agents to properly construct requests and interpret responses.

data.current_description: Retrieve a paginated list of all files.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve paginated list of user files
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a paginated list of all files belonging to the authenticated user. Supports pagination via query parameters (page number and page size). Returns a FileList object containing file metadata and pagination information. Files are ordered by creation date in descending order.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic. Description lacks details about pagination parameters, return structure, and sorting behavior. Enhanced both to clarify pagination support, specify return type (FileList), and explain default ordering. This enables AI agents to properly construct requests and interpret responses.

message: Operation 'updateFile' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary and description are overly simplistic. Added context about what metadata can be updated, required parameters, partial update support, and return value. This helps AI agents understand the full scope of the operation and what to expect in responses.

data.current_description: Update the name of a file.
data.description_suggestion: Update the name and metadata of a file. Requires the file ID as a path parameter and a request body containing the new file name. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Returns the updated file object with all current metadata including transcription status.
data.reasoning: Summary and description are overly simplistic. Added context about what metadata can be updated, required parameters, partial update support, and return value. This helps AI agents understand the full scope of the operation and what to expect in responses.
